arts.ttl: Newcastle’s plan to ward off Arsenal and Liverpool interest in England star
arts.sum: Newcastle have a plan to ensure that Anthony Gordon stays at the club amid interest from Arsenal and Liverpool, according to the latest reports. The outlet reports that: "Newcastle will offer to make Anthony Gordon their highest earner on a deal worth close to £9million per season as they try to convince him to stay."

arts.sum: Manchester City are set to be without Kevin De Bruyne for when they take on title challengers Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium on Sunday - after picking up an injury in midweek

arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Scamacca expected back ahead of schedule
arts.sum: Atalanta’s striker Gianluca Scamacca is making faster progress than anticipated in his recovery from an anterior cruciate ligament tear. The Roman forward, who underwent surgery on August 5th performed by Professor Mariani, is currently completing the initial phase of his rehabilitation at Villa Stuart. There’s now a new timeline for his return to the pitch. Initially, the recovery period was estimated to be around 6-7 months following his injury. However, contrary to these earlier projections, Scamacca’s return could come sooner than expected. arts.ttl: “One of my favourite players” – Ian Wright lavishes praise on Arsenal-linked star
arts.sum: Ian Wright has lavished praise upon Nottingham Forest defender Murillo, labelling him as ‘one of his favourite players to watch’ right now. The Brazilian arrived at the City Ground last summer from Corinthians and played 36 times across all competitions — including 32 Premier League outings.
